newsSinceJun6: No new RNS or material company news since June 6 (latest filings: June 3 AGM notice/annual report and routine holdings disclosures). Today's -8.8% to 41.25p appears flow-driven: profit-taking on a +700% YTD rerating plus supply overhang from the just-completed GBP 81M fundraise (332.2M new shares admitted ~June 1, placed/subscribed at 19.8p, incl. GBP 30M MACOM strategic subscription), leaving placees on >100% instant gains. Fundamental backdrop unchanged: FY25 revenue GBP 97.3M (-17.6%, wireless -40% vs photonics +15% on AI/data-centre InP demand), guidance for >20% revenue growth in 2026.

sources.label: Investegate - IQE RNS list (no announcements June 5-9; latest June 3)

Yahoo Finance UK - IQE strengthens balance sheet with GBP 81M fundraise as AI photonics demand expands

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's verdict already moved IQE down for the +700%+ YTD rerating, and there is no new fundamental information since June 6 to justify another move on the scaling list. Today's -8.8% is flow-driven (post-placing overhang from 332M shares issued at 19.8p, profit-taking) with the upstream InP epitaxy bottleneck thesis intact, which marginally improves asymmetry rather than damaging it - hold with a small positive delta.
verdicts.bull: IQE is one of the few merchant InP/GaAs epiwafer suppliers levered to AI data-centre photonics; MACOM's GBP 30M strategic subscription validates the asset, the GBP 81M raise repairs the balance sheet, and management guides >20% revenue growth with EBITDA margin recovery in 2026. A flow-driven 9% dip is a better entry into an intact thesis.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but largely discovered: a $0.79B cap up ~700% YTD on FY25 revenue of GBP 97.3M with widening losses leaves valuation resting on flawless 2026 execution; one down day trims only a fraction of the rerating, so rank stands.
verdicts.bear: Wireless (-40% in FY25) remains a drag, losses widened, and 332M new shares placed at 19.8p create persistent sell-pressure from placees sitting on >100% gains; a parabolic chart cracking without news is how post-rerating chases begin to unwind.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AGM on June 30, 2026 and any accompanying trading update confirming >20% FY26 revenue growth, plus concrete AI-photonics InP design wins or capacity commitments converting the bottleneck narrative into booked revenue.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-rerating unwind: crowded positioning plus placing-share overhang compresses the +700% YTD move if 2026 guidance slips or wireless weakness persists, with no fundamental valuation floor nearby.
